  "decision": "fail",

  "component_conditions": [
    "non-compliant"

  "percent_complete": 50,

  "confidence": 1.0,

  "rate": 0.0,
  "order": [],
  "workable": [],
  "findings": [
    "Trench depth exceeds 5 feet with no protective system (shoring, shielding, or sloping)",
    "Spoil pile is located within the 2-foot minimum setback from the trench edge",
    "No safe means of egress (ladder or ramp) within 25 feet of lateral travel"
  ],
  "actions": [
    "Order an immediate stop to all work inside the trench",
    "Evacuate all workers from the unprotected trench immediately",
    "Move the spoil pile back at least 2 feet from the edge of the excavation",
    "Install an approved protective system (trench box, shoring, or slope to correct angle) before allowing re-entry",
    "Provide a secured ladder extending at least 3 feet above the trench landing"
  ],
  "rationale": "The trench is 6 feet deep, which exceeds the 5-foot threshold requiring a protective system under OSHA standards. The vertical walls without shoring or sloping, combined with a surcharge load from the close spoil pile and lack of egress, present an immediate cave-in hazard and critical risk to life safety.",
  "references": [
    "OSHA 1926.652(a)(1) - Protection of employees in excavations",
    "OSHA 1926.651(j)(2) - Protection of employees from loose rock or soil (spoil pile setback)",
    "OSHA 1926.651(c)(2) - Means of egress from trench excavations"
  ]
}
